title: Julie Turner
content:
Chief Human Resource Officer
People.ContactEmail julieturner@mccarthy.ca
Julie Turner is McCarthy Tétrault’s National Chief Human Resources Officer, based in the Toronto office.
As a Senior Human Resources and Business Leader, Julie is responsible to ensure that the talent programs at McCarthy Tétrault support and enhance the firm's culture while remaining competitive within the market. As a member of the firm's leadership team, she works closely with other leaders to implement talent management programs across various offices.
Prior to joining the firm in 2019, Julie gained broad experience developing and implementing diverse HR strategies and programs in national and matrixed organizations in various industries including Telecommunications, Digital, Contact Centres and Automotive manufacturing.
Julie holds an Honours BA from Queen’s University and completed the Human Resources Management Executive Program at the Rotman School of Management.
